name: Matterport 3D Digital Twin API
what_it_does: Matterport REST and GraphQL API for 3D digital twin and spatial data platform. Enables AI agents to manage 3D space creation and scan processing workflows, handle virtual tour embedding and sharing automation, access spatial data and floor plan extraction, retrieve mattertag and annotation data from 3D spaces, manage space organization and folder hierarchy, handle model processing status and completion tracking, access point cloud and mesh data for construction and AEC workflows, retrieve room and area measurement data, manage team collaboration and access permissions, and integrate 3D spatial data with real estate, construction, insurance, and facility management platforms.
use_cases: Managing 3D property tour creation from real estate automation agents
Accessing floor plan and measurement data from construction documentation agents
Integrating digital twin data with property management from facilities agents
Automating model processing workflows from media production agents
not_for: 2D photography and video tours without 3D spatial data requirements
Simple photo hosting without 3D scan and digital twin focus
Consumer VR without professional 3D capture workflow
best_when: A real estate agency, construction company, or facility manager using Matterport wants AI agents to automate scan processing, tour management, spatial data extraction, and property documentation integration.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL NOTE: 3D scan processing takes time after capture — automated workflows must poll for processing completion. Privacy considerations for scanning occupied spaces — ensure occupant consent for scan data.

auth.notes: Matterport uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Client credentials with model, space, and account scopes. Developer documentation at matterport.com/developers. Webhooks for model processing events. JavaScript SDK for embed and viewer integration. GraphQL for flexible spatial data queries. Matterport SDK for Embeds for custom viewer integration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 1 active space; Starter ($79/mo, 5 spaces); Professional ($309/mo, 25 spaces)
pricing.notes: Sunnyvale, California. Founded 2011. Private (CoStar acquisition 2023, $2.9B). 3D spatial data market leader. 10M+ spaces, 800K+ users. Camera hardware (Pro2, Pro3) and mobile app capture. Strong real estate, construction, AEC, and insurance verticals. CoStar acquisition pending regulatory approval. Competes with iGUIDE for real estate 3D tours.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth application; model processing async

known_agent_gotchas: Model processing is async — 3D scan upload triggers processing; poll webhook or status endpoint for completion
GraphQL and REST available — use GraphQL for complex spatial data queries; REST for management operations
CoStar acquisition context — verify API roadmap under CoStar ownership
Privacy for occupied spaces — 3D scans capture sensitive spatial data; ensure consent for occupied commercial and residential spaces
Space active/inactive status — plan tier limits on active spaces; inactive spaces don't count toward limit but aren't accessible
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST/GraphQL API via developer portal
agent_readiness.security_notes: 3D spatial data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. 3D scan data and property spatial information.

security_score_components.security_notes: 3D spatial data platform. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Property spatial data and 3D scans.
